title: X-ray Radiation
description: Adds radiation to gas masks filters medicine similar to METRO
body:
__________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

A mod that adds a radiation system similar to the METRO game series.

After turning on the radiation, you can find more information in the commands. In the Minecraft world, there will be a radiation contamination. You can hide from it underground or wear a gas mask with a clean filter. To determine the level of radiation, you can use a Geiger counter, which will display your accumulated radiation and the overall background radiation. The higher you are, the stronger the radiation will be, so you may need to use filters or move underground to stay safe.
![Rad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4885f9892c0dfd5d4881b9a4cf6e301024d6afd_0.webp)
__________________________________________________________________________________________________________________

Commands:

/radoff Turns off radiation in the world

/radon Turns on the radiation in the world

/radstatus The status of radiation in the world

/radtimer Starts a 10-day timer, after which the world's radiation is activated

/nuclear Starts the Nuclear Winter Test Function

/nuclearoff Disables the Nuclear Winter Test Function
